title: H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises!
